metadata.description: Edge with confidence = -0.1, which is below the valid [0.0, 1.0] range. The schema parses successfully but the Level 1 check catches the negative value. Fails the confidence_in_range Level 1 check.

concepts.name: SessionManager
concepts.description: Persists authenticated user sessions in an in-memory store keyed by session ID, exposing get, set, and invalidate operations. Session entries expire after a configurable TTL (default 30 minutes) enforced by a background sweep that runs every five minutes.

concepts.name: CookieHandler
concepts.description: Reads and writes the __session cookie on HTTP responses, setting Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite=Lax attributes for all production environments. Extracts the session ID for lookup in the SessionManager on each authenticated request.
